hypothesis: Integrating a differentiable micromechanics homogenization model into the PCDiff denoising loop to enforce predicted effective mechanical and thermal responses during sampling will increase the fabrication-valid sample rate (Validityfab) by at least 15% and reduce the mean-squared error between generated and target properties by at least 20% relative to the original PCDiff that uses only non-negativity and sum-to-one regularization.
